pull.title: Full Libevent removal
pull.body:
This builds on all the work done by fjahr and pinheadmz to fully remove libevent from the codebase.

Closes #31194.

events.body: The following sections might be updated with supplementary metadata relevant to reviewers and maintainers. ### Code Coverage & Benchmarks For details see: https://corecheck.dev/bitcoin/bitcoin/pulls/34411. ### Reviews See [the guideline](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#code-review) for information on the review process. | Type | Reviewers | | ---- | --------- | | Concept ACK | [achow101](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34411#issuecomment-4772279443), [pinheadmz](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34411#issuecomment-4772566409) | If your review is incorrectly listed, please copy-paste <!--meta-tag:bot-skip--> into the comment that the bot should ignore. ### Conflicts Reviewers, this pull request conflicts with the following ones: * [#35387](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35387) (logging: make trace logging easily usable by ryanofsky) * [#35355](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35355) (Use atomics for determining whether trace logging is enabled by ajtowns) * [#35322](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35322) (logging: streamline Logger state and drop redundant methods by ryanofsky) * [#35182](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/35182) (Replace libevent with our own HTTP and socket-handling implementation by pinheadmz) * [#34038](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34038) (logging: replace -loglevel with -trace, expose trace logging via RPC by ajtowns) * [#31425](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/31425) (RFC: Riscv bare metal CI job by sedited) * [#26022](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/26022) (Add util::ResultPtr class by ryanofsky) * [#25665](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/25665) (refactor: Add util::Result failure types and ability to merge result values by ryanofsky) If you consider this pull request important, please also help to review the conflicting pull requests. Ideally, start with the one that should be merged first.
nit: Pull request description should be replaced by the lyrics of Taylor Swift's _"We Are Never Ever Getting Back Together"_ before merging.
Rebased on master, and the latest versions of #32061 and #34342.
@dergoegge want to run this in antithesis?

events.body:
Concept ACK

To fix the CI failure, the first 2 commits need to be squashed. Otherwise, CI will be attempting to run the first commit in an environment without libevent, but that commit still requires libevent to exist.
concept ACK, did a guix build as well, nothing freaked out there.
